toast.source: Detailed Toast 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Thursday, June 18' Daily Performance Summary, arrived Fri Jun 19 ~7:39 AM PT. This detailed version carries the same-day-last-week and 4-week-average comparison columns (parsed from the HTML body).
toast.note: Toast Thu Jun 18 (detailed 229 W Montecito summary): Net $6,650.05 / Gross $6,822.15 / 231 guests / 128 orders. vs same Thu last week (Jun 11): Net $5,122.10 (+29.8%), Gross $5,328.20 (+28.0%), Guests 196, Orders 127. vs 4-wk avg: Net $4,462.53 (+49.0%). Labor $1,282.76 = 19.3% (vs 20.2% SDLW, improved). Discounts $172.10 (2.6%), Refunds $130.00, 12 void items (void $ shown as $0.00 on the summary). Avg/guest $28.79, Avg/order $51.95. Fri Jun 19 summary lands ~7 AM today.
